title: Japan Two-Year Bond Sale in Focus as Investors Mull BOJ Outlook
description: Japan’s sale of two-year government bonds on Friday will reveal the appetite for the policy-sensitive debt as investors deliberate over the latest signals from the Bank of Japan.
content: Japan’s sale of two-year government bonds on Friday will reveal the appetite for the policy-sensitive debt as investors deliberate over the latest signals from the Bank of Japan.
